item.title: First responders are the best people on earth… thank you for wha...
item.description:
View on Instagram


First responders are the best people on earth… thank you for what you do. it’s been an honour meeting you guys. 🚨 #lastrong If you have a following: Do fucking better, influence people for the better. It’s not just about you.. it’s bigger than you. #california #californialove #firstresponders #palisade #malibu #firefighter #firefighters #lawenforcement #lafires #californiafires #influncer #giveback #dobetter #burgers

item.title: In-N-Out burgers… don’t f*** it up!
item.description:
View on Instagram


In-N-Out burgers… don’t f*** it up!

item.title: I’m incredibly grateful for being able to do what I do, and woul...
item.description:
View on Instagram


I’m incredibly grateful for being able to do what I do, and wouldn’t possible without you guys watching my videos, I’m even more grateful for every first responder and person working tirelessly to fight these fires. 🚨👮🏼‍♂️🧑🏼‍🚒It’s not just about handing out burgers or a meal, but about showing up and putting a fucking smile on these heroes’ faces, even if it’s just for a minute. They’re giving everything to protect our community. TO OTHER CONTENT CREATORS AND PEOPLE WITH A FOLLOWING: if you aren’t posting about what’s going on in your communities, and only pushing your content or products.. you should be fucking embarrassed. Step up…. Don’t just sit back and post about meaningless shit. #california #californiafires #palisades #malibu #wildfires #firstresponders #firefighter #firefighters #losangeles #lafires

item.title: To all the first responders fighting these fires—some of you hav...
item.description:
View on Instagram


To all the first responders fighting these fires—some of you haven’t fucking slept in days, yet you still show up, exhausted, relentless and working around the clock.You’re not out here for the “thanks” but you fucking deserve it. Thank you for all that you do. First responders are some of the most selfless people I’ve met in my fucking life.👮🏼‍♂️🧑🏼‍🚒🚨 To anyone that has a platform, a voice, a following: Stop posting only about yourself. If you’ve got a platform, use it to actually help. Fuck the vanity—do better, raise awareness, and show up for something bigger than you. This is all bigger than social media, build a better community, build something special. Whatever you see on social media about these fires, it’s worse in person. I’m not saying that to be pessimistic, it’s just the reality. If you can help, there’s a link in my bio. If you can’t help, that’s okay. But if you can, do it. #california #californiafires #firefighters #firefighter #firstresponders #malibu #eatoncanyon #altadena #palisades #losangeles #wildfires #sunsetblvd #hollywood

item.title: This video isn’t really about food, and I’m not here to dive int...
item.description:
View on Instagram


This video isn’t really about food, and I’m not here to dive into the politics of how the governor has “fucked it up.” Instead, I want to highlight the incredible first responders. 🚨 Last night, I had the honor of speaking to hundreds of them. Every single one of them has been working for days without sleep. You could see the exhaustion on their faces—covered in smoke and ashes, with tears in their eyes. What’s happening in California right now is absolutely devastating. Families are losing their homes, the places they’ve built their lives, shared memories and dreamed of their futures..You don’t have to be an influencer or a celebrity to make a difference. If you’d like to help, you can check the link in my bio. There are endless ways you can help. To every first responder out there: thank you. Keep doing what you do. California has your back. The world has your back. Your courage and sacrifice mean everything. ♥️🚒👮🏼‍♂️ #californiafires #firstresponders #palisades #pacificpalisades #losangeles #californiafires #california #lafd
